title: Talent Agent · Microsoft Teams
description: The Eightfold Talent Agent as a 1:1 conversation inside Microsoft Teams, built with Fluent UI v9. Recruiters ask the same natural-language questions — filter applicants by req, search communities, global network, events, CRM outreach, requisition health, talent pool depth, silver medalists — and get Adaptive Card-style responses with FactSets, tables, and 'Open in Eightfold' actions.
author: ypike-eightfold
